title: No More Mineshafts
description: This mod removes the generation of Vanilla Mineshafts
body:
Tired of running into those boring but useless Mineshafts?  
No More Mineshafts solves the problem by removing the generation of mineshafts.

 

Playing the various modpacks, I am always very annoyed by how much the mineshafts ruins the generation of all the other modded and non-modded structures. I often find some collided with the Strongholds, this in my opinion ruins the experience a lot and therefore I decided to create this mod to eliminate their generation.

The command `/locate structure mineshaft` still works, it doesn't freeze your game forever but it will prompt the message _"no structure found"_.

 

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/f32ecfaf-7104-41af-a2e5-b201efa3ee3f.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/TYP)
